name: GT-jordan
source: Prior PROVED registry result prop-bridge-jordan (proofs/prop-bridge-jordan/; status proved). The projected product on A=Im P satisfies the approximate Jordan identity (JB4): ||((a•a)•b)•a - (a•a)•(b•a)|| <= C_4 sqrt(eta) ||a||^3 ||b||, by exact-ambient-Jordan-identity cancellation of the leading term with O(sqrt(eta)) one-hole error terms. Constant C_4 universal and dimension-free; no complete positivity used (the sqrt(eta) is intrinsic to the operator-norm/positivity hypothesis, not CP).
